description: Recurring meetings for an Arrive organization that must coordinate parking, transit, fleets, partners, city planning, and shared platform convergence after multiple acquisitions.

meetings.title: Product Triad Sync
meetings.description: Weekly working session for the product manager, engineering lead, and design lead within each Arrive squad.
meetings.goal: Keep roadmap choices, delivery tradeoffs, and evidence aligned inside each team.

meetings.title: Platform Convergence Review
meetings.description: Weekly review across value-stream and platform leads focused on where acquired products are still diverging in data, settlement, identity, or workflow behavior.
meetings.goal: Prevent Arrive from operating as a loose collection of brands and systems where shared capability convergence is needed.

meetings.title: City and Operator KPI Review
meetings.description: Weekly KPI review spanning parking yield, transit reliability, city-policy evidence, and business-account control metrics.
meetings.goal: Keep Arrive's operating lines grounded in measurable customer and business outcomes rather than disconnected local optimizations.

meetings.title: Partner Launch Ops
meetings.description: Biweekly operating review of partner certification, market readiness, rule clarity, settlement readiness, and post-launch quality.
meetings.goal: Reduce partner launch friction and expose ecosystem blockers before they stall commercial momentum.

meetings.title: Roadmap Review
meetings.description: Monthly portfolio review of customer evidence, roadmap progress, and cross-domain investment choices.
meetings.goal: Keep investment focused on the highest-leverage platform and customer outcomes across the Arrive portfolio.
